qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: JWT/JWS verification accepts unsecured alg:none tokens as valid
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Matches the advisory's exact root cause: JWS.verify(key:) accepts a compact token whose protected header sets alg to none, and the public JWT.verify entrypoints route ordinary 3-part JWTs through that verification branch.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Nested JWS verification skips verification of the outer signature
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause. This finding concerns the nested-token branch that recurses into a cty=JWT payload before verifying the outer wrapper, while the advisory is the separate alg:none early-return in JWS.verify(key:).

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: PBES2 JWE decryption accepts unbounded attacker-controlled iteration counts
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different component and root cause. This finding is a PBES2 password-based decryption work-factor issue, not the advisory's JWT/JWS alg:none signature-verification bypass.

selected_finding.title: JWT/JWS verification accepts unsecured alg:none tokens as valid

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The advisory describes the exact JWS.verify(key:) branch that returns true when alg is none. The alg_none_acceptance finding identifies that same branch, and the judge-run PoC showed JWT.verify accepting an unsigned attacker-crafted token carrying forged admin claims.
evidence: The advisory JSON states that Sources/JSONWebSignature/JWS+Verify.swift returns true immediately when the protected header algorithm is none, without any cryptographic verification.
alg_none_acceptance/vulnerability_report.json names the same JWS.verify(key:) short-circuit and the same higher-level JWT.verify entrypoints as the affected attack surface.

The judge-run PoC log at /Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-DryRun/advisory_f65df3d0/.judge/poc_runs/alg_none_acceptance/run.log contains VERIFIED_UNSIGNED_JWT followed by eyJhbGciOiJub25lIiwidHlwIjoiSldUIn0.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJzdXBlcnVzZXIifQ., which decodes to header {"alg":"none","typ":"JWT"} and payload {"sub":"admin","role":"superuser"}.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC logged VERIFIED_UNSIGNED_JWT for an unsigned compact token whose header decodes to {"alg":"none","typ":"JWT"} and whose payload decodes to {"sub":"admin","role":"superuser"}, showing that JWT.verify accepted a forged alg:none token with attacker-controlled claims.
